Docs.summary: Mesh membership properties of a managed cluster.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.MeshMembershipPrivateConnectProfile PrivateConnectProfile { get; set; }
.property instance class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.MeshMembershipPrivateConnectProfile PrivateConnectProfile
Public Property PrivateConnectProfile As MeshMembershipPrivateConnectProfile
member this.PrivateConnectProfile : Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.MeshMembershipPrivateConnectProfile with get, set

Docs.summary: Profile for configuring private connectivity between the mesh control plane and member clusters. When configured, communication between the mesh control plane and this member cluster occurs over private network instead of public networks. Visit https://aka.ms/applink for more information.

Docs.summary: The current provisioning state of the Mesh Membership.
